response.justification: Bogdan brings 20 years of software engineering experience and is actively building AI infrastructure expertise at re:cinq, meeting the experience baseline. However, the role requires recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products—his background is primarily backend and infrastructure engineering, with AI work spanning only months. The absence of an advanced AI degree and lack of shipped AI-powered platforms make him underqualified for a director-level AI strategy position, though his technical depth warrants consideration if he can articulate deeper AI strategy thinking.
strengths: 20 years of progressive software engineering experience with multiple staff-level leadership roles across diverse domains
Currently contributing to AI infrastructure and agentic workflows at re:cinq, demonstrating active effort to develop AI expertise
Strong track record of founding open-source projects, technical mentoring through workshops, and speaking at industry conferences
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; education in Computer Science and Fine Arts rather than AI specialization
AI experience is recent (4 months) with no demonstrated track record of shipping AI-powered products or platforms at scale
Career primarily focused on backend systems, infrastructure, and web development rather than AI/ML as core technical specialization
